# From Data to Networks

## 3.1 Why Network Thinking?

Traditional analysis:

* Focus on individual genes

Network analysis:

* Focus on interactions

---

## 3.2 Building a Network in R

```{r}
library(igraph)

edges <- data.frame(
  from=c("TP53","MYC","EGFR"),
  to=c("MYC","EGFR","MTOR")
)

g <- graph_from_data_frame(edges)
plot(g)
```

---

## 3.3 Adjacency Matrix

```{r}
as_adjacency_matrix(g)
```

---

## 📌 Suggested Figures

* Network plot
* Adjacency matrix
